It is an unedited photograph of a green hill and blue sky with white clouds in the Los Carneros American Viticultural Area of CaliforniaвАЩs Wine Country. Charles OвАЩRear took the photo in January 1996 and Microsoft bought the rights in 2000. It is estimated that billions of people have seen the picture, possibly making it the most viewed photograph in history.

Dreamcore is an internet aesthetic that recreates the feeling of being in a dream, especially the kind that is nostalgic, confusing, or slightly unsettling. It often features familiar places like empty hallways or playgrounds, but presented in a distorted or eerie way, along with blurry visuals and random, cryptic text.
